{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221957578E9145B7D908F780E8B6"}"},"total":4120},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7411509258869588761","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，日常描写不错的同时还构建了一个挺大的世界观，虽然有点粗糙但从最后的伏笔回收来看并没有崩掉，看得出作者在大纲这一部分是下了功夫的。美中不足的地方在于战力系统太简陋，战力全靠境界堆，战斗就是比谁境界高，决战部分粗糙感明显，而且主角团无脑强，结局观感较差。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725631395,"group_id":"7039672181244038178","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"千帆过尽皆不是 斜晖脉脉水悠悠。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0hskKVcicFj/MKP3frwfYgKqHhjBTpyqE/4HIOucS0n","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6c918719263944cfabd13712997efd83~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707277&x-signature=skLSqwOVPHbOJ2sCo0IXVxC6hCU%3D","user_id":"1447417331070494","user_name":"天真蓝呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1447417331070494","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7039672181244038178","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食+开店+日常+轻松欢乐+御兽+系统】 
本书又名：《那些年，我与系统不能说的故事》《带着‘仨娃’的悠闲日常》《饭店内，我无敌你们随意》《震惊，我的三只宠兽竟全是大佬》
身为美食家的江明喝下百年极品女儿红，意外穿越平行世界蓝星，获得灵厨系统。
原本江明只想着报仇之后，就安稳赚钱，带着三小只安稳过日，将妹妹培养成最强御兽师。可随着饭店名气打响，前来吃饭的食客身份越来越高。
江明看着众人恭敬的眼神，无奈叹了口气。
我真的只是一个普通人！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2db64ba3133ebe5b8dc061e1342ef029","author":"爱写书的鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7039672181244038178","book_name":"御兽：我真的只想安稳的开饭店","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7039672616004780580","read_count":"13782","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2050637"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"970","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,宠物,美食,灵气复苏,都市异能,搞笑轻松,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/33b686cf2841536cb2261a113d55480 尤其是第1章，我感觉神了［自我感觉］
我只希望这本书不要凉了，火起来啊，这样才有动力，我不想在追书的时候，追着追着作者人没了，好几本了，为什么会盯新？这个谁知道他们怎么想的，反正不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1643641310,"group_id":"7039672181244038178","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"就让你们看看，这葫芦里卖的是什么药！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwQpgd2rRoBT+Qz64DAYMgQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/64b7939d063f4c1d8dd00f808f6b9d24~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705862&x-signature=LfulakP8ROCYTruTxaApt%2FRBjzI%3D","user_id":"43588110524648","user_name":"夏瑶"""},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"43588110524648","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1714607085,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7039672181244038178","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食+开店+日常+轻松欢乐+御兽+系统】
